news.title:
Nifty IT gains 1.2% as rupee hits record low; Oracle Financial leads with 5% rise.
Weaker rupee boosts IT profitability; DSP Mutual Fund highlights sector's solid ROEs, valuations.
news.summary:
Nifty IT gains 1.2% as rupee hits record low; Oracle Financial leads with 5% rise.
Weaker rupee boosts IT profitability; DSP Mutual Fund highlights sector's solid ROEs, valuations.

news.title:
Oracle Financial Services (OFSS) surged 7% on a major US bank deal, replacing existing agreements.
Despite gains, technical resistance looms near ₹7,444; broader market remains weak with Nifty 50 down 1%.
news.summary:
Oracle Financial Services (OFSS) surged 7% on a major US bank deal, replacing existing agreements.
Despite gains, technical resistance looms near ₹7,444; broader market remains weak with Nifty 50 down 1%.

news.title: Oracle Financial shares climb 6% after major order win.
news.summary: Oracle Financial shares climb 6% after major order win.

news.title:
Oracle Financial signs a deal with a US global bank for perpetual software licensing.
The deal, valued at $100M (₹940 crore), includes transition services and personnel.
news.summary:
Oracle Financial signs a deal with a US global bank for perpetual software licensing.
The deal, valued at $100M (₹940 crore), includes transition services and personnel.

news.title:
Oracle Financial Services surged 5.3% intraday, hitting Rs 6,645 on 18 Mar 2026.
The stock outperformed its sector and benchmark indices significantly.
news.summary:

news.title:
Oracle shares rose 8% after strong earnings and guidance amid market volatility.
Brent oil fell 7.8% to $91.2; S&P 500 dropped 0.21%, 10-yr Treasury yield at 4.15%.
news.summary:
Oracle shares rose 8% after strong earnings and guidance amid market volatility.
Brent oil fell 7.8% to $91.2; S&P 500 dropped 0.21%, 10-yr Treasury yield at 4.15%.

news.title: Oracle announces plans for significant job cuts amid AI-related financial strain.
news.summary: Oracle announces plans for significant job cuts amid AI-related financial strain.

news.title:
Oracle Financial Services Software executed a block trade of ~24,092 shares.
The trade was valued at Rs. 18.1 Cr, with a price of Rs. 7512/share.

news.title: Oracle plans to cut 30,000 jobs as banks retreat from AI data center financing.
news.summary: Oracle plans to cut 30,000 jobs as banks retreat from AI data center financing.

news.title:
Oracle Financial Services' Q3 net profit rose to ₹6.1B from ₹5.4B YoY.
Q3 revenue increased to ₹19.66B, up from ₹17.15B YoY.
news.summary:
Oracle Financial Services' Q3 net profit rose to ₹6.1B from ₹5.4B YoY.
Q3 revenue increased to ₹19.66B, up from ₹17.15B YoY.

news.title:
Oracle Financial Services Software Ltd's board meeting on Jan 21, 2026, will review Q3 and nine-month financial results.
The unaudited standalone and consolidated results for Dec 31, 2025, will also be published on the company's website.
news.summary:
Oracle Financial Services Software Ltd's board meeting on Jan 21, 2026, will review Q3 and nine-month financial results.
The unaudited standalone and consolidated results for Dec 31, 2025, will also be published on the company's website.

news.title:
FPIs sold $8.5B of Indian IT stocks in 2025, the highest annual selloff, as Nifty IT Index fell 13% vs Nifty 50's 10.5% gain.
Oracle fell 40%, TCS 21%, HCLTech 15% amid H-1B visa concerns. Telecom stocks saw $5.4B inflows, while FMCG faced $4.2B outflows.
news.summary:
FPIs sold $8.5B of Indian IT stocks in 2025, the highest annual selloff, as Nifty IT Index fell 13% vs Nifty 50's 10.5% gain.
Oracle fell 40%, TCS 21%, HCLTech 15% amid H-1B visa concerns. Telecom stocks saw $5.4B inflows, while FMCG faced $4.2B outflows.

news.title:
Nifty IT index fell 2.5% on January 5 amid expectations of muted Q3 FY26 growth.
IT sector stocks like Infosys, TCS, and Wipro faced pressure during the session.
news.summary:
Nifty IT index fell 2.5% on January 5 amid expectations of muted Q3 FY26 growth.
IT sector stocks like Infosys, TCS, and Wipro faced pressure during the session.

Oracle delays some OpenAI-related data center projects to 2028.
Oracle denies delays in OpenAI partnership despite stock decline.

news.title:
US markets rose after a 25 bps Fed rate cut; Dow up 1.1%, Nasdaq 0.3%.
Oracle shares fell 11% post-hours despite beating EPS due to weak revenue.
news.summary:
US markets rose after a 25 bps Fed rate cut; Dow up 1.1%, Nasdaq 0.3%.
Oracle shares fell 11% post-hours despite beating EPS due to weak revenue.

news.title:
Key corporate actions: Colgate's stock split on Nov 3, PSUs like Coal India & HPCL announce dividends.
FMCG firms Hindustan Unilever, Godrej, Dabur to trade ex-dividend this week; notable payouts from Oracle Financial & Shree Cement.
news.summary:
Key corporate actions: Colgate's stock split on Nov 3, PSUs like Coal India & HPCL announce dividends.
FMCG firms Hindustan Unilever, Godrej, Dabur to trade ex-dividend this week; notable payouts from Oracle Financial & Shree Cement.

news.title:
Several Indian stocks, including Coal India, BPCL, Mazagon Dock, and Hindustan Unilever, will trade ex-dividend from 3 Nov 2025.
Notable dividends include Oracle Financial Services (₹130/share) and Sanofi India (₹75/share). BEML will undergo a stock split on 3 Nov.
news.summary:
Several Indian stocks, including Coal India, BPCL, Mazagon Dock, and Hindustan Unilever, will trade ex-dividend from 3 Nov 2025.
Notable dividends include Oracle Financial Services (₹130/share) and Sanofi India (₹75/share). BEML will undergo a stock split on 3 Nov.

news.title:
Shree Cement, Colgate Palmolive, Oracle Financial offer large dividends; last buy date is Oct 31 to qualify.
Oracle Financial to pay Rs 130/share, Shree Cement Rs 80, Colgate Palmolive Rs 24; dividends taxable as per law.
news.summary:
Shree Cement, Colgate Palmolive, Oracle Financial offer large dividends; last buy date is Oct 31 to qualify.
Oracle Financial to pay Rs 130/share, Shree Cement Rs 80, Colgate Palmolive Rs 24; dividends taxable as per law.
